AnonymousRecordAnalyzer.fs.reason: opt-in anon-record analyzer: the AST walk has one arm per SynExpr/SynType/SynPat case so it descends through arbitrary nesting; tests cover the realistic constructs that can host an anonymous record, but many rarely-load-bearing descent arms (e.g. DotIndexedSet, ObjExpr, AddressOf, Upcast/Downcast, MeasurePower, Or-types) cannot reproducibly host one to be exercised. Pinned at the honest achieved floor rather than excluded.

AstAnalyzer.fs.reason: loosened: v5 aggregate-type invalidation (containment links) + Layer 2a.1 fixture-edge emission (ctor-params + IClassFixture interface detection); defensive try/with paths around FCS metadata access are not reproducibly hit from tests; impossible-states cleanup added explicit FSharpEntity branches (IsArrayType / IsByRef / final else-None) that F# source cannot synthesize an FSharpEntity for

Attributes.fs.reason: loosened: marker attributes — no runtime logic to cover

Coverage.fs.reason: Cobertura parse/ingest/emit for TestPrune-native coverage. The only uncovered branch is the defensive isNull-root guard after XDocument.Parse, which always yields a root (or throws) for the well-formed reports MS emits, so it cannot be reproducibly exercised. (Batch-ingest refactor moved the Some/None attribution branches into Database.RecordCoverageBatch, lowering this file's total branch count.) Pinned at the honest achieved floor rather than excluded.

Database.fs.reason: loosened: UPSERT-based RebuildProjects + timestamp orphan cleanup added branches; conditional extern UPSERT path not hit by existing fixtures

FalcoRouteAnalysis.fs.reason: loosened: edge-injection refactor changed coverage profile, handler→test symbol resolution branches

ImpactAnalysis.fs.reason: loosened: added DependsOnFile/DependsOnGlob attribute seeding (JSON parsing + glob-to-regex + path normalization); one defensive catch arm for malformed JSON is hard to reach through the test harness

InMemoryStore.fs.reason: loosened: attribute store branches added for SQL extension support

Orchestration.fs.reason: loosened: ProjectOutcome DU fold refactoring added uncovered branches

RouteStore.fs.reason: TestPrune.Falco's plugin-owned route table. Every line is covered, including the transaction-rollback arm. The 7 uncovered branches are all compiler-generated `use`-scope disposal null-checks (`if disposable <> null then Dispose()`) on connections, commands, readers and the transaction — SqliteConnection.CreateCommand/ExecuteReader/OpenConnection never return null, so the null arm cannot be reproducibly hit. Same structural reason Database.fs carries a 70% branch floor. Pinned at the honest achieved floor rather than excluded.

SqlHydraAnalyzer.fs.reason: loosened: table reference parsing edge cases
